programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

E67
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E590
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E5113
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E1968
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E856
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: Brief Encounter In Shinjuku
programme.desc: Foon, a Public Relations manager, starts a happy life with his wife Ann after remarrying her. Kwan, a new public relation officer in Foon's department, falls in love with Foon after he shields her from being criticized, when there is friction between Foon and Ann. Thus Foon falls in love with Kwan gradually. After a business trip to Tokyo, their relationship becomes much closer, while Ann meets Chu, a councilor, who falls in love with her but can't get Ann's response. When returning to Hong Kong, Kwan doesn't want to destroy Foon's family and decides to marry her fianc? When Foon is depressed by this, Ann finds out the truth. Another rupture breaks out again.

programme.title: Knockabout
programme.desc: Little John and brother Big John make a living out of crooked exploits and swindling. Their tricks turn sour and they find themselves stripped of cash with nowhere to turn. Desperate for protection, they scurry under the wings of mysterious master, only to pay a heavy price when they discover their master is a con man with a violent past...

programme.title: All About Ah Long
programme.desc: Ah Long is a car racing fanatic who is in love with Ah Kar. Ignoring her mother's advice, Ah Kar decides to marry Ah Long. Tragic follows by this illegal car racing contest...

programme.title: Sleazy Dizzy
programme.desc: Lung was an informer of Police in the triad society. But his identity was exposed and lost all memory after hurt. All of money that given by the Police was lost. The Police suspicious Lung had hidden the money. So he was wanted by the triad society and Police. Sing was a little thief, he knew Lung and made friend together. He knew everything about Lung then, and he wanted to help Lung to recover his memory aimed to take back the money. Fong was a manger in a big firm. He had stolen a large amount of money of his firm and was discovered by his colleague later. So he wanted to kill Wu but failed. Fong also wanted the money of Lung, as a result, he wanted to kill Lung also. Wu was saved by Lung and Sing. The Boss of Fong knew everything were exposed and ordered Koo to kill Lung, Sing and Wu. But Wu won't do that because of their friendship...

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: 24 Oras
programme.desc: Gives an up-to-the minute news here and around the world.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: Last Dance
programme.desc: Aged 75 Germain, a contemplative home-body, finds himself widowed and having to cope with his children's somewhat invasive concern about him. Determined to keep a promise made to his wife years earlier, he has to take part in a contemporary dance creation, but without letting the family know.

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: E7 - When Two Hearts Meet
programme.desc: Florence realises that Leon fancies her and she helps him to go through Francis's archives in search of information about Marianne. Leon discovers that his mother had been hiding an enormous secret.

programme.title: Un Apres-Midi A Se Fesser Dessus
programme.desc: The Bouchard-Beauregards are in the final stages of preparing for their move. Sophie, a devoted wife and mother, struggles to manage the chaos around her.

programme.title: E21 - Heading For Asia
programme.desc: Specialised fairs on Japanese culture are numerous. Manga, animated films, video games and cosplay: a budget that generates huge revenue. In Colmar, a Manga museum, unique in Europe, is about to open its doors. Enough to strengthen the already significant cultural exchanges between France and Japan.

programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Revealing a different side to a nation most famous for its hyper-modern metropolises, this pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa to uncover the secrets of Japan's most iconic animals.

programme.title: E11 - Robert Trains A Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival.

programme.title: E12 - Pit Bull Vs Rattler
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff fights to save a pit bull bitten by a rattlesnake. And, Dr. Amy performs emergency surgery when a girl's beloved Chihuahua is hit by a car.

programme.desc: Revealing a different side to a nation most famous for its hyper-modern metropolises, this pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa to uncover the secrets of Japan's most iconic animals.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Vienna
programme.desc: Vienna is beautiful. Surrounded by elegant imperial facades, people enjoy culture and coffee. Or, they might clatter past St. Stephen's Cathedral and the Sisi Museum in horse-drawn carriages. But when night falls, the city shows itself in a whole new light.

programme.desc: From Venezuela's extra heavy crude oil to Trump's focus on Greenland's rare earths to Germany's F60 steel giants and illegal gold mines in Indonesia: How raw materials impact landscapes, people, and politics.

programme.title: E7 - Holey Moley
programme.desc: Bill's swinging-arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams. Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant sense of style.

programme.title: E8 - Giving Up The Ghost Flip
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the 'ghost flip', a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: The Top 4 contestants compete for a chance to win $10,000 in travel vouchers, after each picking a mystery ingredient inspired by the judge's personal travel adventures.

programme.title: E7 - Pool House Clusterflip
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.desc: The Top 4 contestants compete for a chance to win $10,000 in travel vouchers, after each picking a mystery ingredient inspired by the judge's personal travel adventures.

programme.title: E19 - In Chinon (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Chinon, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the region's castles and a local treasure, saffron.

programme.title: E4 - From The Three Lakes Region To Geneva, Via Lavaux
programme.desc: The Jura Foot railway line is one of the most beautiful in Switzerland. Lake Biel, Lake Neuchatel and on further south, the train wends its way to the wine-producing region of Lavaux. The journey then continues along the shores of Lake Geneva before ending in Geneva itself.

programme.title: E9 - Shopping When You Are Visually Impaired?
programme.desc: Visually impaired individuals often encounter difficulties shopping, even online. Websites and stores are far too often poorly adapted to their condition. Also covered: antibiotics and farm animals; orange juice; ravioli for dessert.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Chefs Pierre-Olivier Pelletier and Cassandre Osterroth prepare and cook guinea fowl with mushrooms in regional style, that of Quebec City and its terroir.

programme.title: E1 - Olivier Paradis, Trekking Guide In Morocco
programme.desc: Olivier Paradis welcomes Canadian tourists for a hike through the Moroccan High Atlas. Unfavourable weather conditions force them to change route, testing their capacity for adaptation and their flexibility of both mind and body. During their journey they cross the path of a group of noble Amazigh.

programme.title: E69
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E20 - In Chinon (Best Of)

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/A Bunch Of Baby Ducks/Trucker Hall Of Fame/That's My Tele
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E9 - Deep Space
programme.desc: While space has always been the final frontier, it's also been an unknowable one that every country has wanted to be first to conquer. Finally, newly released documents give us glimpses into their plans.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: Doki by the Dozen
programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: Plastic Bottle
programme.desc: Watch Hepi and Briko transform plastic bottles into something out of this world. Literally.

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Accidentally Trapped
programme.desc: DiktaThor and Cleopatra ceasefire and combine forces to stop Sprinter. They put traps all over Hilltown, but everybody except Sprinter gets trapped. There is only one thing that the superhero can do - to set up the villains against each other.

programme.title: Tongue Tongs
programme.desc: Tongue-tong is the newest supervillain weapon against Sprinter. Sprinter uses his wit and gives the villains a taste of their own medicine.

programme.title: Chocolate Truffles
programme.desc: The little cooks discover where cocoa powder comes from, and add all the necessary ingredients to make some delicious chocolate truffles.

programme.title: Thinking out Loud
programme.desc: A bump on the head gives Flippy the power to hear everyone's thoughts, which is fun for a while and results in an unexpected relationship with Naomi. However, he soon realises that always hearing the truth can be uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Great Garden Disaster
programme.desc: When Heni leaves Newts to take care of her garden for a week, Darwin and Newts have to figure out why some of the plants aren't growing so well.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Dramatic Landscapes
programme.desc: Phillipe visits Yellowstone National Park and Zion National Park in the United States. Then he travels to a Pacific island to explore some of the tallest sea cliffs in the world. He ends up in Canada.

programme.title: What Makes a Planet?
programme.desc: We'll explain why Pluto is no longer considered a planet, and why some scientists believe there is an undiscovered planet in our solar system. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at many objects that, regardless of definition, look like new and fascinating planets.

programme.title: It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: Bad Luck Fish
programme.desc: Fontaine believes that a fish is responsible for wrecking Dolos' boat, sinking the Aronnax, and placing the Rover in deadly jeopardy!

programme.title: The Great Garden Disaster
programme.desc: When Heni leaves Newts to take care of her garden for a week, Darwin and Newts have to figure out why some of the plants aren't growing so well.

programme.title: Thinking out Loud
programme.desc: A bump on the head gives Flippy the power to hear everyone's thoughts, which is fun for a while and results in an unexpected relationship with Naomi. However, he soon realises that always hearing the truth can be uncomfortable.

programme.title: Bad Luck Fish
programme.desc: Fontaine believes that a fish is responsible for wrecking Dolos' boat, sinking the Aronnax, and placing the Rover in deadly jeopardy!

programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Ye Hai Mohabbatein
programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E5 - Fun and Games with All Our Friends!
programme.desc: It's time for fun & games with all our friends! First, Jill is shy at her first mermaid swimming class, but she learns to have fun & trust herself with the help of her friends. Then, during a Mexican posada, Manny teaches Baby John how to build a piñata. After he gets over being a little scared of the blindfold, he has lots of fun! The fun continues as the friends learn to compromise when they have opposite ideas for playtime.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day with Cody!
programme.desc: Spend a super fun day with Cody from morning to night! Join Toni & Cody as they bond during a special Hair Wash Day, where they scrub, rinse & comb his perfect curls. Then, Cody dresses up in a safari outfit & leads his Dad on a quest through a jungle-like environment to find dinosaurs! The fun day ends with a silly bedtime routine where his parents make deliberate mistakes, prompting laughs from Cody as he 'corrects' them.

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Home Base Plus
programme.desc: A lifestyle show that offers practical home building, improvement, and design ideas to help viewers create better living spaces.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: Paterno
programme.desc: HBO Films’ PATERNO centres on Penn State’s Joe Paterno in the aftermath of the Jerry Sandusky sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The cosmic battle for world supremacy begins as Superman inadvertently releases three powerful exiled Kyrptonians and must stop them at all cost!

programme.title: E1160
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: Mann V. Ford
programme.desc: This HBO documentary follows the Ramapough Indians as they take on Ford and the Environmental Protection Agency to secure a healthy future for their children.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E14 -Finito!
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2E15 -Finale: Meal Of A Lifetime
programme.desc: Season 2 Finale. The pressure is on as only one thing is now standing between our chefs and the title of Top Chef Junior: each other. The final 2 chefs must give it their all as they dream up the meal of a lifetime. Top Chef Junior Season 1 finalists Rahanna & Owen, and cooking legend Emeril Lagassé, all make special appearances in this thrilling conclusion as the final 2 chefs create mind-blowing menus demonstrating their growth from young cook to accomplished chef. To help them conquer this daunting task, a few familiar faces return…but will these returning chefs lend a hand or could there be too many cooks in this kitchen? In the end, only one of the finalists will receive the title of Top Chef Junior!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E9 -Gone Fishin' (Sort Of)
programme.desc: Scoutmaster Lumpus is determined to finally catch a fish, and he certainly doesn't need the Jelly Beans to help him reel one in. Or does he?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E10 -Beans Are From Mars
programme.desc: The Squirrel Scouts discover that the Jelly Beans are actually from another planet and take them hostage to find out more.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E13 -More Flower To You
programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2E17 -Ice Cream Anti-Social
programme.desc: Perplexed by Martha's strange behavior, Rodney and Andy stow away on the ice cream truck of the all-knowing Sludgy Dave hoping to learn from his sage like ways.

programme.desc: Rodney discovers he's impervious to blame and goes into business as The Blametaker!

programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When an executive's ex-boyfriend travels through time and brings back a 19th century nobleman, she reluctantly takes responsibility for showing him the 21st century.

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E3 - The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E1 - Ted Nugent
programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Ted Nugent.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: E3 - Bear in Focus
programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E14 - Columbia
programme.desc: Catfish and Rooftop go on a mission with the Colombian military's anti-narcotics division, test bulletproof clothing on themselves and experience the most painful insect sting in the world.

programme.title: E4 - Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.

programme.title: Maozhou River
programme.desc: “Maozhou River”is a documentary series about China's first full scale river treatment operation. Throughout the four episodes, through the story of major characters, it documents the transformation of this “black river” to a clear waterway; the creativity and determination of Bao'an, Shenzhen, them exploring the ways of this city and industry-wide reformation; the nostalgia of the local residents, and their determination to watch over their hometown. This not only marks the history of this river, but also represent the history of this city, and a reflection on philosophy and our ecosystem.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today's Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

E48
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 多海是魔論製菓公司疲憊不堪的營銷團隊經理，她不知道自己還能忍受這種看似毫無希望的生活多久。就在這時，一心追求經濟利益的銷售部恩尚向她提出了投資加密貨幣的大膽建議。在經歷了無數次失敗後，加密貨幣成了恩尚最後的救命稻草，也是她扭轉人生的一線希望。會計部智松把花錢等同於幸福，出於害怕被拋在後面，她衝動地加入了他們。這場賭博很快變成了加密貨幣市場跌宕起伏的過山車之旅。當放棄歌唱事業、冉冉升起的公司董事咸志宇加入他們時，不可預測的混亂局面只會加深。這三個普通工人能否中大獎，一路飛向月球？

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E10 - Finale
programme.desc: The top three bakers battle it out to be crowned South Africa's Best Amateur Baker. For their final signature bake, Siba and Paul request 24 glazed petit fours, which highlight distinct South African flavours. The technical challenge comes with a twist that takes the bakers by surprise, and for their last challenge of the season, bakers have 5 hours to create a large sculpture - the final chance to impress the judges enough to claim the title.

programme.desc: Childhood friends Pooja and Karan separate when she moves cities. Years later, they reunite unknowingly, missing each other while searching for the same lost bond again. Release Year: 2002 Director: Talat Jani

programme.desc: Insight investigates and analyses topical issues that impact Asia and the rest of the world.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Where would you go if you received a note from your loved one saying only Meet me there? Series looks at the emotional attachment people have with places and explores how an individual's memory of a shared place can differ from those he/she shared it with.

programme.title: E10 - 討論愛情裡的信任與分寸
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
programme.desc: When strangers Reet and Ruhan cross paths, their journey leads to an abandoned mansion and a dreaded spirit who has been trapped for 18 years.
